v : E
T : @Distribution E inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ Ω F inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² n
φ : TestFunction Ω ℝ k
⊢ (@DFunLike.coe

          @Distribution E inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ Ω F inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² k)

      φ =
    T (-(TestFunction.lineDerivWithOrderCLM k n v) φ)
